endpoints.name: Retrieve Advisors
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the Advisors in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve Advisors for a Client
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the Advisors for the client.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CLIENTID}} with a real clientid. Replace {{HOUSEHOLDID}} with a real householdid.

endpoints.name: Retrieve an Advisor
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves an Advisor from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve plan assumptions
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves an object containing all assumptions for the specified plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve business entities
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the business entities in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a business entity
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a business entity from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve Monte Carlo results from standalone calc service
endpoints.description: Currently just stubbed out, POC in development

endpoints.name: Retrieve defined benefit pensions
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the defined benefit pensions in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a definedBenefitPension
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a defined benefit pension from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Accepts the EULA
endpoints.description: Accepts the EULA

endpoints.name: Retrieve family
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves an object containing all familymembers for the specified plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve the adjustments
endpoints.description: This function retrieves a goal and the adjustments made to it
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Perform calculations
endpoints.description: This function returns the posted object and the adjusted calculation values
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Returns a list of goals with their relevant success rates.
endpoints.description: Returns a list of goals with their relevant success rates.

endpoints.description: This function retrieves a goal and the adjustments made to it

endpoints.name: Perform calculations
endpoints.description: This function returns the posted object and the adjusted calculation values
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Returns a list of goal adjustment restrictions.
endpoints.description: This function returns a list of adjustment restrictions for all goals.

endpoints.name: Retrieve the adjustments
endpoints.description: This function retrieves a goal and the adjustments made to it for a particular client

endpoints.name: Perform calculations

endpoints.name: Returns WAMO values for current goal

endpoints.name: Retrieve goals
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the goals in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve goals
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a goal from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve holding companies
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the holding companies in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a holding company
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a holding company from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve all Households associated with the user
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of households the current user has access to or one household specified by a householdId parameter

endpoints.name: Retrieve liabilities
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the liabilities in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a liability
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a liability from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the lifestyle assets in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve lifestyle assets
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a lifestyle asset from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.description: Retrieves all goals from the live plan

endpoints.description: This function retrieves a list of funding accounts for the goals in the plan

endpoints.name: Retrieve WAMO values for a given goal
endpoints.description: This function retrieves the WAMO values for the specified goal
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve net worth
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves an object containing net worth values for specific dates within the plan:
              * Plan Start Date
              * Retirement Date
              * Plan End Date.

endpoints.description: Determines if the currently logged in user has set their own password

endpoints.name: Retrieve plan information
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves the high level plan information for a given plan

endpoints.name: Retrieve plan data statuses
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves the data statuses of the published plan if on demand updates
            are enabled

endpoints.name: Retrieve portfolio accounts
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the portfolio accounts in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a portfolio account
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a portfolio account from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve projected annual summaries
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves an object containing annual summary information 
              for each year of the projected plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve projected annual summary by id
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves an object containing annual summary information 
              for a single specified year of the projected plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve projected cash flow
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves an object containing cash flow information 
              for each year of the projected plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve projected cash flow by id
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves an object containing cash flow information 
              for a single specified year of the projected plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve assets funding goals over time
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves the assets funding each goal throughout the plan years

endpoints.name: Retrieve needs vs abilities data
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves a needs and abilities data for all goals throughout
              the plan years.

endpoints.name: Retrieve projected net worth
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves an object containing net worth information 
              for each year of the projected plan. These are EOY numbers.

endpoints.name: Retrieve projected net worth by id
endpoints.description:
This operation retrieves an object containing net worth information 
              for a single specified year of the projected plan. These are EOY numbers.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Retrieve restricted stocks
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the restricted stocks in the plan.

endpoints.name: Retrieve a restricted stock
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a restricted stock from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of all of the stock options in the plan.

endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a stock option from the plan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.
